label: Calibration, uncertainty & risk evaluation

node.label: Calibration, uncertainty & risk evaluation
node.definition: Calibration and risk evaluation test whether predicted probabilities, abstention scores, intervals, or confidence estimates match observed correctness and harm.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Calibration, uncertainty & risk evaluation is to connect Calibration, uncertainty & risk objectives, Benchmarks, test suites & task metrics to downstream capabilities including Time-series forecasting, anomaly & fraud detection, Medical imaging & clinical decision support, Tabular predictive analytics & decision support.
